creator: ade@lovett.com
text:
One more distfiles survey fix.  x11-wm/afterstep-devel distfiles
	were unreachable (the archives have changed layouts somewhat).

Fix: I've taken the opportunity to upgrade the port to 1.7.90
	which appears to have the beginnings of GNOME support.

	Apply following patch.

cvs diff: Diffing .
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd x11-wm/afterstep-devel; make fetch
